summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EventFlow mobile event management app. All major features working correctly including dashboard, event creation, calendar with indicators, settings, analytics, and Google Calendar export.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in clicks or direct URL navigation

integration_issues.issue: New event may not immediately appear in dashboard list after creation
integration_issues.note: Event is created successfully in backend, may be a frontend refresh timing issue

passed_tests: Backend API - All 10 endpoints working (100% success)
Events list displays with announcement/advertising badges
FAB button opens event creation form
Event form has all required fields (title, date, price, description)
Calendar page shows colored indicators (green=event, amber=announcement, blue=advertising)
Settings page allows changing announcement/advertising days
Settings changes are saved and applied to existing events
Analytics page shows statistics, pending actions, and charts
Event detail dialog opens with all options (edit/delete/export)
Google Calendar export opens new tab with correct URL
Bottom navigation works between all 4 pages
